title: OpenAI's $122B Raise at $852B Valuation
text: OpenAI announced $122 billion in committed capital at $852 billion post-money valuation on March 31, 2026. OpenAI generated $13.1 billion revenue in 2025 (up from $10 billion target). Projects $280+ billion revenue by 2030. Priced on 2028 revenue forecast of $125 billion (6.8x multiple, below Nvidia, in line with Microsoft). At $852B post-money with $24B trailing revenue, priced at 35x multiple vs 12x Microsoft, 9x Alphabet, 14x Nvidia. Laying groundwork for 2026 IPO, hired former CFO as first head of investor relations. Internal targets: H2 2026 filing, 2027 listing, potential $1 trillion valuation.
